series_metadata.series_description: Includes physical, chemical and biological analysis data or river basins in district, comprehensive water quality data, fixed station monitoring program, water quality special projects and corvallis data.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain 5 years in operating area until incorporated into river basin reports, Comprehensive Water quality Reports (CWQR) and/or Storage and Retrieval (STORET), then destroy, Paper: Wastepaper
